items.title: Citi says this stablecoin issuer is its top pick, expects stock to nearly triple
items.description: Citi sees shares of Circle Internet Group rallying 192% from here.

items.title: Nvidia posted another blockbuster quarter. One analyst says the stock is a ‘coiled spring’ waiting to snap higher
items.description: For the most part, analysts maintained their long-term bullish stance on Nvidia.

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The S&P 500 booked back-to-back gains Wednesday as tech giants — including Nvidia — jumped during the session.

items.title: How you can squeeze a little more yield from your idle cash in exchange for a bit of risk
items.description: Not all money market funds are built the same. Some funds offer investors a bump in interest income if they're willing to take a little more risk.

items.title: Are collectibles a viable asset class? The buyer of the $16.5 million Pokémon card thinks so
items.description: AJ Scaramucci thinks trading cards have experienced tremendous growth, and thus they, and other collectibles, are great alternative investments.
